title: On Faithfulness and Factuality in Abstractive Summarization
query: Which studies should I look into that have explored the task of factuality in abstractive summarization and proposed ways to detect hallucinated content in generated text?

方法.snippet: It is well known that the standard likelihood training and approximate decoding objectives in neural text generation models lead to less human-like responses for open-ended tasks such as language modeling and story generation.

数据.snippet: We conducted a large scale human evaluation of several neural abstractive summarization systems to better understand the types of hallucinations they produce.

结论.snippet: In this paper we have analyzed limitations of these models for abstractive document summarization and found that these models are highly prone to hallucinate content that is unfaithful to the input document.

局限.snippet: In this paper we have analyzed limitations of these models for abstractive document summarization and found that these models are highly prone to hallucinate content that is unfaithful to the input document.

关联强度.source: LitSearch official gold target; relevance treated as strong in this spike

title: Detecting Hallucinated Content in Conditional Neural Sequence Generation
query: Are there any studies that explore post-hoc techniques for hallucination detection at both the token- and sentence-level in neural sequence generation tasks?

方法.snippet: Neural sequence models can generate highly fluent sentences but recent studies have also shown that they are also prone to hallucinate additional content not supported by the input, which can cause a lack of trust in the model.

数据.snippet: We also introduce a novel method for learning to model hallucination detection, based on pretrained language models fine tuned on synthetic data that includes automatically inserted hallucinations.

结论.snippet: Neural sequence models can generate highly fluent sentences but recent studies have also shown that they are also prone to hallucinate additional content not supported by the input, which can cause a lack of trust in the model.

关联强度.source: LitSearch official gold target; relevance treated as strong in this spike

title: A Simple Recipe towards Reducing Hallucination in Neural Surface Realisation
query: Which studies should I look into that have explored the task of factuality in abstractive summarization and proposed ways to detect hallucinated content in generated text?

方法.snippet: Recent neural language generation systems often hallucinate contents (i.e., producing irrelevant or contradicted facts), especially when trained on loosely corresponding pairs of the input structure and text.

数据.snippet: To mitigate this issue, we propose to integrate a language understanding module for data refinement with self-training iterations to effectively induce strong equivalence between the input data and the paired text.

结论.snippet: To mitigate this issue, we propose to integrate a language understanding module for data refinement with self-training iterations to effectively induce strong equivalence between the input data and the paired text.

局限.snippet: Experiments on the E2E challenge dataset show that our proposed framework can reduce more than 50% relative unaligned noise from the original data-text pairs.

关联强度.source: LitSearch official gold target; relevance treated as strong in this spike

title: Understanding Factuality in Abstractive Summarization with FRANK: A Benchmark for Factuality Metrics
query: Which studies should I look into that have explored the task of factuality in abstractive summarization and proposed ways to detect hallucinated content in generated text?

方法.snippet: Modern summarization models generate highly fluent but often factually unreliable outputs.

数据.snippet: This motivated a surge of metrics attempting to measure the factuality of automatically generated summaries.

结论.snippet: Through these annotations we identify the proportion of different categories of factual errors and benchmark factuality metrics, showing their correlation with human judgement as well as their specific strengths and weaknesses.

局限.snippet: Moreover, all these methods treat factuality as a binary concept and fail to provide deeper insights on the kinds of inconsistencies made by different systems.

title: Evaluating the Factual Consistency of Abstractive Text Summarization
query: Are there any studies that explore post-hoc techniques for hallucination detection at both the token- and sentence-level in neural sequence generation tasks?

方法.snippet: Currently used metrics for assessing summarization algorithms do not account for whether summaries are factually consistent with source documents.

数据.snippet: Currently used metrics for assessing summarization algorithms do not account for whether summaries are factually consistent with source documents.

结论.snippet: Transferring this model to summaries generated by several state-of-the art models reveals that this highly scalable approach substantially outperforms previous models, including those trained with strong supervision using standard datasets for natural language inference and fact checking.

title: End-to-End Relation Extraction using LSTMs on Sequences and Tree Structures
query: Can you recommend some literature that focuses on dependency-based models for relation extraction, especially those that utilize dependency parsing to capture non-local syntactic relations?

方法.snippet: We present a novel end-to-end neural model to extract entities and relations between them.

结论.snippet: Our model improves over the state-of-the-art feature-based model on end-to-end relation extraction, achieving 12.1% and 5.7% relative error reductions in F1-score on ACE2005 and ACE2004, respectively.

title: Sequence-based Structured Prediction for Semantic Parsing
query: Can you suggest literature on enhanced semantic parsing methods that focus on generating high-quality meaning representations and utilize knowledge-constrained decoding under specific grammar rules?

方法.snippet: We propose an approach for semantic parsing that uses a recurrent neural network to map a natural language question into a logical form representation of a KB query.

数据.snippet: Our experiments show important improvements over previous results for the same dataset, and also demonstrate the advantage of incorporating the grammatical constraints.

结论.snippet: We also show how grammatical constraints on the derivation sequence can easily be integrated inside the RNN-based sequential predictor.

title: Neural Semantic Parsing with Type Constraints for Semi-Structured Tables
query: Can you suggest literature on enhanced semantic parsing methods that focus on generating high-quality meaning representations and utilize knowledge-constrained decoding under specific grammar rules?

方法.snippet: We present a new semantic parsing model for answering compositional questions on semi-structured Wikipedia tables.

数据.snippet: On the WikiTableQuestions data set, our parser achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy of 43.3% for a single model and 45.9% for a 5-model ensemble, improving on the best prior score of 38.7% set by a 15-model ensemble.

结论.snippet: On the WikiTableQuestions data set, our parser achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy of 43.3% for a single model and 45.9% for a 5-model ensemble, improving on the best prior score of 38.7% set by a 15-model ensemble.

关联强度.source: LitSearch official gold target; relevance treated as strong in this spike

title: VIRT: Improving Representation-based Text Matching via Virtual Interaction
query: Could you direct me to studies investigating the enhancement of bi-encoder text matching performance through the application of knowledge distillation methods?

方法.snippet: Interaction-based approaches treat the text pair as a single sequence and encode it through cross encoders, while representation-based models encode the text pair independently with siamese or dual encoders.

数据.snippet: Experimental results on six text matching benchmarks demonstrate the superior performance of our method over several state-of-the-art representation-based models.

结论.snippet: It enables deep interaction between texts by effectively transferring knowledge from the interaction-based model.

局限.snippet: However, these models suffer from severe performance degradation due to the lack of interactions between the pair of texts.

关联强度.source: LitSearch official gold target; relevance treated as strong in this spike
